assertion_results.text: The post-triage summary comment (Step 8) includes an @mention of the vulnerability issue's reporter using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id' (§1.67)

assertion_results.text: The reporter @mention in Step 8 is present by default without any ProdSec configuration — it uses the reporter field from the Jira issue (§1.67)

This same account ID appears in remediation.md (Step 8) line 60 as '[557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id] @psirt-analyst'. The reporter was sourced from the Jira issue's reporter field, not from any ProdSec configuration.

The account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' matches the expected ProdSec account ID from Security Configuration, demonstrating successful extraction in Step 0 and usage in Step 3.
